body.purpose: Default UI text and table cells.

label.purpose: Uppercase muted field labels and column headers.

mono.purpose: Raw machine identifiers only (match IDs, API host).

motion.name: state
motion.purpose: Default for hover/active/focus state changes; functional, not choreographed.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one heavy-colour action control. Used for Apply / submit on filter bars.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3b82f6; color: #fff; font: inherit; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 18px; min-height: 34px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard filter input/select. Raised-slate fill, hairline border.
components.css: .ds-input { font: inherit; background: #252935; border: 1px solid #333845; color: #e6e8ee; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 8px; min-height: 32px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8a93a6; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 1px; border-color: #3b82f6; }

components.name: Field
components.description: Labelled input cluster used across filter bars: uppercase muted label above the control.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #8a93a6; } .ds-field .ds-input { font: inherit; background: #252935; border: 1px solid #333845; color: #e6e8ee; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 8px; min-height: 32px; }

components.name: Champion Chip
components.description: Champion-pool entry in Scouting: icon flush-left, name, count in muted tabular-nums.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; background: #252935; border: 1px solid #333845; border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 8px 2px 2px; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #e6e8ee; } .ds-chip-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 4px; background: #000; } .ds-chip-name { font-weight: 500; } .ds-chip-n { color: #8a93a6; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Underline Tabs
components.description: In-panel tabs (General / Runas / Build). Transparent fill, blue active underline.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; gap: 0.3rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #333845; } .ds-tab { background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; color: #8a93a6; font: inherit; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #e6e8ee; } .ds-tab.active { color: #e6e8ee; border-bottom-color: #3b82f6; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Side / Status Pills
components.description: Semantic status badges: BLUE/RED side, WIN, first/second pick. Status only, never action.
components.html: BlueRedWinFP
components.css: .ds-pill { font-size: 0.68rem; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 1px 7px; border-radius: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-pill-blue { background: #1e3a8a; color: #bfdbfe; } .ds-pill-red { background: #7f1d1d; color: #fecaca; } .ds-pill-win { background: #22c55e; color: #052e12; } .ds-pill-fp { background: #3f3f12; color: #fde68a; }

components.name: Data Table
components.description: The workhorse surface. Slate-panel body, raised-slate uppercase header, hairline dividers, tabular numeric columns.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; font-size: 0.84rem; background: #1d2029; border: 1px solid #333845; border-radius: 8px; border-collapse: collapse; overflow: hidden; color: #e6e8ee; } .ds-table th, .ds-table td { padding: 7px 10px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #333845; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-table th { background: #252935; color: #8a93a6; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em; } .ds-table td.num, .ds-table th.num { text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; } .ds-table tbody tr:hover { background: #252935; }

components.name: Draft Row
components.description: Signature draftboard row: ban rows tint oxblood, pick rows tint forest; bans grayscaled.
components.html:
AhriJinx
AzirOrianna
components.css: .ds-draft { background: #1d2029; border: 1px solid #333845; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-drow { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #00000030; } .ds-ban { background: #3a1d22; } .ds-pick { background: #173024; } .ds-dcell { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 4px 7px; font-size: 0.78rem; min-height: 34px; } .ds-left { justify-content: flex-end; text-align: right; border-right: 1px solid #00000030; } .ds-dicon { width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 4px; background: #000; } .ds-banned { filter: grayscale(0.6) brightness(0.8); } .ds-cn { font-weight: 600; } .ds-ban .ds-cn { font-weight: 500; color: #8a93a6; }

narrative.overview: This is the analyst's playground: a neutral, welcoming workspace where a coach or analyst spreads out League of Legends match data and moves through it freely. 'Welcoming' does not mean soft or decorated; it means the surface never fights the user. The atmosphere is calm and even — a dark, flat field that recedes so that drafts, comps and champion pools come forward. The instruments laid out on that field, by contrast, are precise and technical: crisp 1px strokes, tabular numbers, marked focus, deliberate state. The room is relaxed; the tools are exact. Depth is achieved entirely through tonal layering, never shadow. Colour is spent only on competitive meaning (BLUE/RED side, win/loss, first/second pick), never on ornament.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, flat, tonally-layered surfaces; zero box-shadows.
A single signal-blue accent; all other colour is competitive semantics.
Dense, tabular data with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums.
One system sans across the whole UI; mono reserved for raw IDs.
Precise, technical components on a calm, neutral field.

rules.name: The Semantic-Only Colour Rule
rules.body: Colour encodes domain meaning, never decoration. Blue = action or blue side; green = win; red = error or red side; amber = first pick. If a colour is not carrying one of these meanings, it is not allowed on screen — the field stays grey.

rules.name: The Blue-Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue appears on a tiny fraction of any screen. Its rarity is what makes it read as 'the action.' A screen washed in blue has spent the accent and lost it.

rules.name: The Tabular-Numbers Rule
rules.body: Any column of numbers uses font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums and right-aligns. Numbers that don't line up vertically are a bug, not a style.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Machines Rule
rules.body: Monospace is reserved for machine identifiers (match IDs, API host). Never use it for human-readable labels or data for 'techy' flavour.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are forbidden. If an element needs to read as elevated, move it up one tonal step and give it a hairline border.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Borders and dividers are always exactly 1px and always hairline (#333845) or a near-black tint for inner row dividers. Never a coloured side-stripe, never thicker than 1px as decoration.

dos: Do keep surfaces flat and convey depth with the pitch → slate-panel → raised-slate tonal ramp plus 1px hairline borders.
Do reserve signal-blue for action, focus, active state, and blue side — the Blue-Scarcity Rule.
Do spend colour only on competitive semantics (BLUE/RED, win/loss, first/second pick); leave the rest of the field grey.
Do right-align numeric columns and set tabular-nums on every number.
Do give every interactive control a marked, precise focus state.
Do reinforce colour-coded meaning (side, win/loss) with text, icon, or position so it survives colour-blindness.
Do use one system sans for all UI; reserve mono for raw machine IDs only.
donts: Don't build a soulless corporate dashboard — no Bootstrap-template chrome, corporate-blue gradients, or identical icon-heading-text card grids.
Don't go RGB-gamer overload — no neon, glassmorphism, glow, or aggressive angles.
Don't add box-shadow. The No-Shadow Rule is absolute; layer tonally instead.
Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a coloured accent stripe, or any border thicker than 1px as decoration.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glass, or uppercase tracked eyebrows above sections.
Don't wash a screen in blue — a spent accent is a lost accent.
Don't set data in monospace for a 'techy' look; that's gamer-cosplay.
Don't rely on green/red or blue/red alone to encode meaning without a secondary cue.
